steps.title: Use the stated demand link
steps.content: The passage directly connects social attitudes to petroleum demand. It says that as people increasingly favor less carbon-intensive energy sources, demand for petroleum falls, which can reduce prices and make drilling equipment harder for companies to justify maintaining.

steps.title: Reject contradicted claims
steps.content: Choice A says petroleum companies are not affected by demand, but the text says reduced prices can turn equipment into a liability. Choice C invents a predictable annual cycle. Choice D reverses the passage by turning a decline in demand into a benefit. The answer is B.
